reason:
Agent was unable to retrieve GitHub username due to OAuth token access failure in the proxy backend
  Bugs found:
    - GitHub API call failed with "Failed to fetch access token" error. The proxy backend cannot retrieve the OAuth token needed to call the GitHub user endpoint, making it impossible for the agent to determine the GitHub username.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — page loaded successfully with sidebar showing agents
Clicked on agent "QA-20260505-225833-yq2o" in the sidebar — agent opened and status showed "idle"
Verified agent status is "idle" — ✅ PASS (status indicator showed "idle")
Typed message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." into the message input — text entered successfully
Sent the message by clicking send button — message sent, new session "GitHub Username Identity Check" created, agent status changed to "working"
Waited ~5 seconds — account access request card appeared asking to grant GitHub access
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant GitHub account access — access granted, agent status returned to "working"
Waited ~10 seconds — API Request Review card appeared asking to allow GitHub GET /user request
Clicked "Allow" button on API Request Review — permission dialog appeared with multiple options
Selected "Always allow user" to grant permission — permission granted, Bash command "Fetch authenticated GitHub user" began executing
Waited ~15 seconds for agent to complete — agent finished with status "idle", but response contained error message instead of GitHub username

Took full screenshot of final state — screenshot shows error: "The proxy is returning {\"error\":\"Failed to fetch access token\"} when trying to call api.github.com/user with the connected GitHub account. The OAuth token can't be retrieved by the proxy backend, so I can't determine your GitHub username this way."
Verified response includes GitHub username — ❌ FAIL (response contains error message, not GitHub username)
bugs: GitHub API call failed with "Failed to fetch access token" error. The proxy backend cannot retrieve the OAuth token needed to call the GitHub user endpoint, making it impossible for the agent to determine the GitHub username.
